summary: Comprehensive testing of Job Radar application completed successfully. Backend APIs achieved 95.2% success rate (20/21 tests passed). Frontend functionality working excellently across all features including dashboard navigation, wishlist operations, cron job management, job tracking, and AI integrations.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 for job creation
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status code

minor_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: Dashboard navigation (6 icons: Resume, Search, Tracker, Wishlist, Cron, Statistics)
Landing page loads with radar animation and Launch Dashboard button
Wishlist page functionality with Saved/Applied sections
Cron Jobs (Auto Search) CRUD operations and job scanning
Job Tracker CRUD operations, status filtering, and export
AI recommendations with detail modal and search links
Cron job creation, running, and deletion
Dark Electric Command Center theme implementation
Glass card design elements and proper contrast
